note: Machine candidate index summary. NOT public content. Excerpt-bearing *-candidates.json are git-ignored; every candidate is publishable:false and requiresHumanReview.
method: transliterated proper-noun / recurring-image bilingual matching (weak ranking hint only)

englishClassification.note: Added 2026-07-14 after the preflight audit found eight pairings whose English side was Whinfield's prose story argument, not verse. Only verse_translation may be paired.

verseCandidates.method: section-title-alignment (story heading + verse-section title vs Nicholson section title)
verseCandidates.supersedes: transliterated proper-noun body overlap for Rumi
verseCandidates.caveat: Single-anchor (score 1) hits are unreliable and must not be treated as identification: عمر is both the name Omar and the common noun "life", and "The Arab and his Wife" ranks the Arab-and-dog story on the shared term اعرابی alone. Ranking is a review hint only.
